1200000960.korean: 저 비행선에 타자마자 주인님께 해를 끼치거나 그대로 도망가버릴 수도 있지 않나. 아니면 비행선을 폭파시키는 방법도 있고.

1200000961.english: - Fafnir's subordinates saw the situation and intervened.

1200000962.english: What do you think of our boss!

1200000963.english: - It seems Fafnir is well-regarded by her subordinates.

1200000964.english: Our captain wouldn't do such a cowardly thing!
1200000964.korean: 우리 대장은 그런 비겁한 짓 못하거든!

1200000965.english: If our boss were smart enough to use such cowardly tactics, we'd all be living more comfortably!
1200000965.korean: 우리 대장이 그런 비겁한 수를 쓸 정도로 똑똑했으면 우리도 더 편하게 지냈겠지!

1200000966.english: Our boss just wants to show off her treasure!
1200000966.korean: 우리 대장은 단순히 자기 보물을 자랑하고 싶어하는 것 뿐이라고!

1200000967.korean: 우리 대장의 바보스러움을 얕잡아 보지 마!

1200000968.english: Even if our boss tries to run away, she can't do anything if the captain says no!
1200000968.korean: 우리 대장이 도망치려고 해도 기관장이 안 된다고 하면 꼼짝도 못해!

1200000969.english: Our captain is the kind of person who would give up their life before giving up the treasure!
1200000969.korean: 우리 대장은 보물을 포기할 바에는 목숨을 포기할 사람이라고!

1200000970.english: Even if our boss is an idiot, don't call her an idiot proudly in front of others...
1200000970.korean: 우리 대장이 아무리 바보라고 하더라도 남들 앞에서 당당하게 바보라고 하지마…

1200000971.english: You're worse for pretending to stop them while actually joining in on the criticism! And stop peeling it! You bad people!
1200000971.korean: 말리는 척하면서 같이 까는 네가 더 나빠! 그리고 그만 까! 나쁜 것들아!

1200000972.english: - You have a good reputation, right?

1200000973.english: And even if the captain has bad intentions, we cannot disobey your command, human. Because they're a Bioroid.
1200000973.korean: 그리고 대장이 나쁜 마음을 먹어도 저희들은 인간님의 명령을 거부할 수 없어요. 바이오로이드니까.

1200000974.english: Oh, I heard the boss is a special model and human commands don't work on them.
1200000974.korean: 아, 대장은 특수한 모델이라 인간의 명령권이 안 통한다고 하더라고요.

1200000976.english: Why do you think our boss calls the haka the dragon's nest?
1200000976.korean: 저희 대장이 하카를 왜 용의 둥지라고 부르는 거 같나요?

1200000978.english: Even tho it's called a fleet, it's just a title. That's all there is to it.
1200000978.korean: 함대라고 말해도 그냥 호칭만 함대지. 하카 하나가 전부예요.

1200000980.english: If there was any benefit to hiding it, I would have hidden it too. Now, it's easier to get help if you're honest about it.
1200000980.korean: 숨겨서 좋을 거 있었으면 저도 숨겼겠죠. 지금은 솔직하게 밝히는 쪽이 도움을 받기 용이하다고요.

1200000981.english: - I was momentarily lost in thought, looking at Fafnir, Sterling, Fafnir's subordinates, and the giant airship floating in the sky.
1200000981.korean: - 나는 파프니르와 스털링 그리고 파프니르의 부하들 그리고 하늘에 떠 있는 거대한 비행선을 보고 잠시 생각에 빠졌다.

1200000984.english: Even in the old days, the empress...

1200000986.english: Oh, anyway. Right now, I'm the boss, so I can live however I want. Why would I?
1200000986.korean: 어, 어쨌든. 지금은 내가 대장이라 내 마음대로 살 수 있는데 내가 왜?

1200000987.english: I don't like it. We've been doing just fine without that, haven't we?
1200000987.korean: 싫네요. 그런 거 없어도 우리끼리 잘 살아왔거든?

1200000988.english: We need help maintaining our Haka, you know...

1200000989.english: - It seems like you have no intention of joining Orca at all.
1200000989.korean: - 오르카에 합류할 생각이 전혀 없는 것 같다.

1200000990.english: - Trying to convince them further here would just be a nuisance.
1200000990.korean: - 여기서 더 설득하려고 해봤자 귀찮아 할 뿐이겠지.

1200000992.english: Of course, I would give my life to protect my master... but I don't want to take even a small risk.
1200000992.korean: 당연히 제 목숨을 바쳐서 주인님을 지키겠지만… 약간의 위험도 감수하고 싶지 않습니다.

1200000993.english: Um... then, can we leave our kids here? As a hostage.
1200000993.korean: 어… 그러면 저희 애들 여기 남겨둬도 될까요? 인질로.

1200000994.english: No matter how many of you there are, or even if you gathered all the androids in the entire world, do you think you would be worth more than our Master?
1200000994.korean: 너희가 아무리 많아도, 아니, 온 세상의 모든 바이오로이드들을 모아도 주인님 한 분보다 가치가 있을 거라 생각하나?

1200000995.english: That's true, but... our boss isn't the type to abandon her subordinates.
1200000995.korean: 그렇긴 한데… 우리 대장이 부하를 버릴 정도로 의리가 없는 것도 아니거든요.

1200000996.english: And... our captain really values treasure. Even what I have now. And also the delusion that they will have it in the future.
1200000996.korean: 그리고… 우리 대장이 보물은 정말로 소중히 여기거든요. 지금 가지고 있는 것도. 앞으로 자기가 가질 거라고 착각하는 것도.

1200000997.english: I will never do anything bad to humans.
1200000997.korean: 인간님께 나쁜 짓은 절대로 안 할 거예요.

1200000998.english: Of course! I would never do anything that would diminish the value of a treasure!
1200000998.korean: 당연하지! 보물의 가치를 떨어트리는 짓은 절대로 안 해!

1200001001.english: Isn't it just a matter of giving the order? Betray Fafnir and join Orca. Subdue Fafnir. Like this. Anyway, Haka is useless without me.
1200001001.korean: 그냥 명령 내리면 되는 거 아닌가요? 파프니르를 배신하고 오르카에 합류해라. 파프니르를 제압해라. 이런 식으로. 어차피 하카는 저 없으면 무용지물이니까요.

1200001003.english: That's not it, but... it's easier that way, isn't it?

1200001009.english: So you were thinking that all along.

1200001012.english: Tell them we're granting permission to enter our airspace.

1200001014.english: Yes, I am the last and the first human. The Supreme Commander of Orca.
1200001014.korean: 그래, 내가 마지막이자 첫번째 인간. 오르카의 총사령관.

1200001016.english: Hold it, Vargr. Huh? Aren't I good?

1200001017.english: Were you the one communicating earlier?

1200001019.english: Yeah. That sounds like a pretty good name.

1200001020.korean: 그런데 무슨 일로 여기에 온 거야?

1200001022.english: So, it was you guys who have been collecting gold recently?
1200001022.korean: 최근에 금을 모으고 있다는 게 너희였어?

1200001024.english: I know. Because Vargr, JangHwa, and CheonA were all in the same group.
1200001024.korean: 알고 있어. 여기 있는 바르그, 장화, 천아도 같은 집단에 있었으니까.

1200001025.english: But you said it was the Golden Fleet. Are there other airships beside the Haka?
1200001025.korean: 그런데 황금 함대라고 했잖아. 하카 말고 다른 비행선도 있어?

1200001027.english: Fafnir. Are you thinking of joining Orca?

1200001028.english: You can get a lot of help from Orca. Orca can also be of great help.
1200001028.korean: 오르카에 많은 도움을 받을 수 있어. 오르카도 많은 도움을 받을 수 있고.

1200001030.english: If Vargr goes with us, wouldn't it be okay?

1200001031.english: Then please allow me, Vargr, and the technical staff to board.
1200001031.korean: 그러면 나랑 바르그 그리고 기술진들의 승선을 허가해줘.

1200001033.english: Would you like me to give you an order?

1200001034.english: If I did something like that, would Orca come looking for me from the outside?
1200001034.korean: 내가 그런 짓을 하면 외부에서 오르카를 찾아올까?

1200001035.english: Above all, that kind of behavior isn't right, is it?

1200001036.english: Someone's brother, guest, master, friend, lord, darling, boss...
1200001036.korean: 누군가의 오빠이자 손님, 주공, 친구, 주인님, 달링, 보스…

1200001037.english: Captain, mister, Magical Gentleman, Steel Line Fighter VI Diamond...
1200001037.korean: 대장, 아저씨, 매지컬 젠틀맨, 스틸라인 파이터 VI 다이아몬드…

1200001038.english: - Boarded Fafnir's giant airship, the Haka, or the Dragon's Nest.
1200001038.korean: - 파프니르의 거대 비행선 하카 혹은 용의 둥지에 승선했다.

1200001039.english: I mean me, Vargr, Fortune, Gremlin, and the other escort members who boarded with us because Vargr insisted.
1200001039.korean: - 나와 바르그, 포츈과 그렘린 그리고 바르그가 우겨서 같이 탑승한 다른 호위 대원들이 말이다.

1200001040.english: However, Fafnir did not care at all that additional people boarded.
1200001040.korean: - 하지만 파프니르는 추가 인원이 더 타도 전혀 아랑곳하지 않았다.

1200001041.english: Fafnir was eager to show us their treasure.
1200001041.korean: - 파프니르는 우리에게 자신들의 보물을 보여주려고 안달이 났다.

1200001042.english: Hehe~ You'll automatically be amazed when you see my treasures, too.
1200001042.korean: 흐흥~ 너도 내 보물들을 보면 저절로 감탄할 거야.

1200001043.english: It's a treasure I collected while going through all sorts of hardships.
1200001043.korean: 내가 온갖 고생을 하면서 모은 보물이거든.

1200001044.english: My subordinates suffered even more. They just wasted their energy loading useless treasures onto the hakka.
1200001044.korean: 고생은 부하들이 더 했죠. 쓸 데 없는 보물들 하카에 싣느라 괜히 힘만 뺐잖아요.

1200001045.english: Hey! But I was the one who did most of the fighting!
1200001045.korean: 야! 그래도 싸우는 건 거의 다 내가 했잖아!

1200001046.english: You're the one who started the fight that didn't even need to be fought just to take the treasure.
1200001046.korean: 보물 가져가려고 싸울 필요도 없는 싸움을 먼저 시작한 것도 대장이잖아요.

1200001047.english: Fighting the remaining AGSs to rob the bank…
1200001047.korean: 은행 턴다고 아직 남아 있는 AGS들이랑 싸우고…

1200001048.english: The two of them bickered, but at heart, they seemed to be on good terms.
1200001048.korean: - 두 사람은 티격태격하지만 근본은 사이가 좋은 것 같았다.

1200001049.english: Here! This is the treasure vault of the dragon's nest!

1200001051.english: We were overwhelmed by a mountain of treasures that filled an entire room.
1200001051.korean: - 우리는 방 하나를 가득 채운 보물의 산에 압도되었다.

1200001052.english: I saw a treasury filled with treasure at Angel's tomb as well, but the amount of treasure here was much greater than at Angel's tomb.
1200001052.korean: - 앙헬의 무덤에서도 보물이 가득 쌓인 보물고를 봤지만 이곳의 보물의 양은 앙헬의 무덤보다 훨씬 많았다.

1200001053.english: Gold, gold, gold, gold, painting, gold, silverware, gold, gold, gold, jewelry, ornaments, gold, gold, gold, gold, pottery, gold, gold, gold, gold, figure, gold, gold, gold, statue, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold, gold…
1200001053.korean: - 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 그림, 황금, 은식기, 황금, 황금, 황금, 보석, 장신구, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 도자기, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 피규어, 황금, 황금, 황금, 조각상, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금, 황금…

1200001054.english: Hehe, right? Amazing, isn't it? Cool, isn't it? Beautiful, isn't it?

1200001055.english: These are treasures I have collected for a long time.

1200001056.english: These paintings are authentic pieces from the art museum, and that crown over there was found at the royal palace. Those pillars were excavated exactly as they were from the ruins.
1200001056.korean: 이 그림들은 미술관에 있던 진품들이고, 저기 있는 왕관은 왕궁에서 찾았어. 저 기둥들은 유적에서 그대로 파왔지.

1200001057.korean: 하지만 내가 가장 좋아하는 건 황금이야.

1200001058.english: Even if its form changes, its value hardly changes. It doesn't rust or weather. It has many uses. And it is heavy and shiny!
1200001058.korean: 형체가 달라져도 가치는 거의 변화가 없지. 녹이 슬거나 풍화되지도 않지. 쓰임새도 많지. 그리고 묵직하고 반짝반짝하지!

1200001059.english: So I worked hard to save up.

1200001060.english: That amount is as much as…

1200001062.english: You really worked hard to save this much, didn't you?
1200001062.korean: 이 만큼 모은다고 정말로 고생 많이 했다?

1200001064.english: It's amazing! I've never seen anything like this before!
1200001064.korean: 굉장하거든! 이 언니 이런 건 처음 보거든!

1200001066.english: It's amazing how well it's floating even with a cargo weighing 24,000 tons.
1200001066.korean: 2만 4천 톤에 달하는 적재물을 싣고도 이렇게 잘 떠 있는 게 신기하거든?

1200001068.english: To be precise, it is 24,000 tons plus alpha. There are other treasures, and the floor was reinforced to withstand this load.
1200001068.korean: 정확하게 말하자면 2만 4천 톤 플러스 알파죠. 다른 보물들도 있고, 이 하중을 버티기 위해 바닥도 보강했으니까요.

1200001069.english: Theoretically, it is possible to build such a massive structure! But making it a reality is another matter! Budget! Time! Manpower! Technology!
1200001069.korean: 이론상으로는 이렇게 거대한 구조물을 만드는 것은 가능해요! 하지만 이를 실현시키는 건 별개의 문제죠! 예산! 시간! 인력! 기술력!

1200001070.english: I'm curious what gas was put in to generate buoyancy. Helium? Hydrogen? Or some other gas?
1200001070.korean: 부력 생성을 위해서 어떤 가스를 넣었는지 궁금하거든? 헬륨? 수소? 아니면 다른 기체?

1200001072.english: Nothing? What do you mean by that?

1200001073.english: It sounds like you're saying a vacuum airship!

1200001075.english: How can such a massive vacuum structure maintain its shape?
1200001075.korean: 이렇게 거대한 진공 구조물이 어떻게 모양을 유지할 수 있는거죠?

1200001076.english: It is the essence of Black River’s architectural engineering, materials engineering, mechanical engineering, aerospace engineering, electrical and electronic engineering, radio engineering, and optical engineering.
1200001076.korean: 블랙리버의 건축공학과 재료공학, 기계공학, 항공우주공학, 전기전자 공학, 전파공학, 광공학의 진수죠.

1200001077.english: The basic structure is a rigid airship with multiple airbags… Although it does not contain airframes, it is constructed with airbags, and then the outer shells of each bag are made of a material with high compressive stress, second moment-
1200001077.korean: 기본은 경식 비행선에 여러 기낭… 비록 기체는 안 들어가지만 기낭으로 구성한 다음에 각 기낭의 외피를 압축응력이 강한 재료로, 2차 모멘트-

1200001078.english: Sterling described Haka with an attitude similar to when Fafnir boasts about her treasure.
1200001078.korean: - 스털링은 파프니르가 보물을 자랑할 때와 비슷한 태도로 하카에 대해 설명했다.

1200001079.english: I understand why Fafnir and Sterling are close...

1200001080.english: And the outermost shell incorporates cloaking fields and thermal and radio wave stealth technologies to prevent detection.
1200001080.korean: 그리고 가장 바깥 외피에는 은폐장과 열, 전파 스텔스 기술을 도입하여 탐지를 막아내죠.

1200001081.english: However, since atmospheric flow is unavoidable, it was designed on the premise of staying at high altitudes to avoid detection.
1200001081.korean: 하지만 대기의 흐름은 어쩔 수 없어서 탐지를 피하기 위해서 평소에는 고고도에서 머무르는 것을 전제로 설계되었어요.

1200001082.english: It rises to a certain altitude using buoyancy, but above that, it uses a separate floating device-
1200001082.korean: 일정고도까지는 부력으로 상승하지만 그 이상에서는 별도의 부유장치로-

1200001084.english: -Thanks to high compressive stress, minor damage can be repaired on its own-
1200001084.korean: -높은 압축응력 덕분에 작은 손상 정도는 스스로 수복-

1200001085.english: - Yeah... I see... I understand completely.

1200001087.english: It means my, my dragon's nest is a tremendous treasure, too.
1200001087.korean: 내, 내 용의 둥지도 엄청난 보물이라는 뜻이야.

1200001088.english: You can't even move without me.

1200001089.english: But, even so, the fact that it's mine hasn't changed.
1200001089.korean: 그, 그래도 내 거라는 건 변함 없잖아.

1200001090.english: Commander! I want to investigate this airship, you know? My engineer spirit is boiling over, you know?
1200001090.korean: 사령관! 누나 이 비행선 조사해보고 싶거든? 누나 엔지니어의 혼이 끓어오르고 있거든?

1200001091.english: Commander! Let's make something similar to this!
1200001091.korean: 사령관님! 우리 이거 비슷한 거 하나 만들죠!

1200001092.english: People 100 years ago made this, so why can't we make it?
1200001092.korean: 100년 전의 사람들도 만들었는데 우리라고 이거 못 만들겠어요?

1200001093.english: So it’s the culmination of Black River’s top-secret technology… isn’t that closer to lost technology?
1200001093.korean: 나름 블랙 리버 극비 기술의 총체라… 로스트 테크놀로지에 가까운데요?

1200001094.english: It's fine! Orca has plenty of excellent engineers, you know? The Gremlin here, this older sister, Lord Azaz, the Doctor's younger brother, Scarabia...
1200001094.korean: 괜찮거든! 오르카에는 훌륭한 기술자들이 많거든? 여기 있는 그렘린, 이 언니, 아자즈 님, 닥터 동생, 스카라비아…

1200001095.english: And there are plenty of outstanding AI babies out there, so if you have enough time and budget, you can definitely replicate them, you know?
1200001095.korean: 그리고 뛰어난 AI아가들도 많으니 시간과 예산만 충분하다면 충분히 복제 가능하거든?

1200001096.english: First off, if I give up on the concept of a vacuum airship, the difficulty of production would drop significantly. Ah, but I really don't like that because it feels like I'm losing...
1200001096.korean: 우선은 진공비행선이라는 개념부터 포기하면 제작 난이도는 확연히 내려가겠네요. 아, 하지만 이러면 지는 기분이 들어서 영 마음에 안 드는데…

1200001097.english: - The two chief engineers of Orca got excited and started chattering about this and that.
1200001097.korean: - 오르카의 대표 기술자 둘은 흥분해서 이것저것 떠들기 시작했다.

1200001098.english: Fafnir looked displeased that Sterling was getting more attention than her.
1200001098.korean: - 파프니르는 자신보다 스털링이 더 주목받는 것에 불만인 표정이었다.

1200001100.english: Huh? Ah! Yes! It's a limited edition figure made by Bismarck! It was originally made as a mockup, but the design was changed later, so it's a unique item with only one made in the world!
1200001100.korean: 응? 아! 응! 비스마르크에서 만든 한정 피규어야! 목업으로 만들었는데 나중에 설정이 변경되어서 세상에 하나만 만들어진 유니크한 물건이지!

1200001101.english: When I showed interest in the treasure, Fafnir excitedly started explaining this and that.
1200001101.korean: - 파프니르는 내가 보물에 관심을 가지자 신나게 이것저것 설명하기 시작했다.

1200001102.english: I could feel how much she loved the treasure from her attitude.
1200001102.korean: - 그녀의 태도에서 그녀가 보물을 얼마나 사랑하는지 느껴졌다.

1200001103.english: - It could be said that she was materialistic and snobbish, but her feelings for the treasure were sincere.
1200001103.korean: - 물질적이고 속물적이라고 할 수도 있겠지만 그녀의 보물에 대한 마음은 진실되었다.

1200001105.english: ...Fafnir, could you explain it in a way I can understand?
1200001105.korean: ……파프니르, 내가 알 수 있는 말로 설명해줄래?

1200001106.english: Is that a figure over there?

1200001110.english: Haha, thanks for your concern, I'm doing fine.

1200001112.english: The map originally showed this area as a safe zone from Iron Beetles, but...
1200001112.korean: 원래 이 근처는 철충으로부터 안전한 구역이라고 지도에 표시되어 있었는데…

1200001113.english: I need to update the map.

1200001114.english: The village I was aiming for is nearby... what if the Iron Blooded Ones attacked it?
1200001114.korean: 목표하던 마을이 근처에 있는데… 철충이 마을을 습격했으면 어쩌죠?

1200001115.english: I should go and check it out as soon as possible.

1200001118.english: That corpse... is it a deer?

1200001119.english: The belly part is torn... isn't it?

1200001121.english: The cross-section is rough, but it's torn straight.

1200001122.english: If it was hunted by a carnivore, it would be difficult for it to be torn in a straight line like this, wouldn't it?
1200001122.korean: 육식동물이 사냥한 거라면 이렇게 일자로 찢어지기 힘들텐데?

1200001123.english: It's like something tore its way out from the inside...
1200001123.korean: 마치 안쪽에서 무언가가 찢고 나온 것 같은….

1200001124.english: ...Get out of the way. I'll put it in the fridge.

1200001125.english: Let's stop by the village and take it when we leave.

1200001126.english: Orca's researchers will report and make a judgment.

1200001127.english: It would be fortunate if it were just a corpse that happened to have these wounds...
1200001127.korean: 그냥 우연히 이런 상처가 생긴 시체라면 다행인데…

1200001128.english: I hope it's not like this everyplace else.

1200001129.english: Coco, do you need any more ingredients?

1200001130.english: No, this is enough. With a little more work, I think I can recover the device.
1200001130.korean: 아뇨, 이거면 충분해요. 조금만 더 손보면 단말기 복구할 수 있을 거 같아요.

1200001131.english: Strange... why are the Iron Blooded in the communication center?

1200001132.english: There's no AI core here to infect, is there?
1200001132.korean: 여기에 감염시킬 AI코어가 있는 것도 아니잖아.

1200001135.english: Come to think of it, the Iron Blooded Ones use factories and stuff, don't they?

1200001136.english: There's nothing strange about connecting to the network using the terminal that was here.
1200001136.korean: 여기 있던 단말기로 네트워크에 접속해도 이상할 건 없지.

1200001137.english: ...Well, I can't say it's not true.

1200001139.english: I'll boot it up and check the usage history.

1200001141.english: Billions of messages were sent with unknown characters?
1200001141.korean: 알 수 없는… 문자로 수십억 건의 메시지가 전송 되었네요?

1200001142.english: Huh? Come to think of it... didn't our server get DDoS attacked before?
1200001142.korean: 응? 그러고보니… 전에 우리 서버 디도스 공격당하지 않았어?

1200001144.english: I'll have to tell the doctor to interpret the meaning of this text message.
1200001144.korean: ……이 문자 무슨 의미인지 해석해달라고 닥터에게 전달해야겠네요.

1200001147.english: Damn it, it pisses me off that the Iron Blooded are using the path we worked so hard to clear.
1200001147.korean: 젠장, 우리가 힘들게 닦아 놓은 길을 철충이 이용하니까 열받네.

1200001148.english: Brigadier General Lumberjane. You can get angry later.
1200001148.korean: 럼버제인 준장. 화내는 건 나중에도 할 수 있음.

1200001149.english: First, I need to report the movement of the Iron Blooded to Orca.
1200001149.korean: 우선 오르카에 철충의 움직임을 보고 해야함.

1200001151.english: With the Iron Plague nearby, we can't use wireless communication carelessly...
1200001151.korean: 철충이 근처에 있으니 함부로 무선 통신은 못 쓰겠고…

1200001153.english: Later, we should also install a large-scale anti-Ironblood barrier to prevent the Ironbloods from moving.
1200001153.korean: 나중에 철충들이 이동하는 것을 막을 수 있게 대철충방호벽도 설치해야겠네.

1200001154.english: Brigadier General Lumberjane. Can you hear something?
1200001154.korean: 럼버제인 준장. 무슨 소리 안 들림?

1200001155.english: What are you talking about? Metal Parasite?
